<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:BД«ng-sГЎeМӨk]][[de:Feuer-Hund]][[fr:Chien de feu]][[hak:PiГЎng-sut]][[ja:дёҷжҲҢ]][[ko:лі‘мҲ ]][[nds:FГјГјr-Hund]][[vi:BГӯnh TuбәҘt]][[za:Bingjswt]][[zh-min-nan:PГ©ng-sut]][[zh-yue:дёҷжҲҢ]][[zh:дёҷжҲҢ]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:BД«ng-sГЎeМӨk]][[de:Feuer-Hund]][[fr:Chien de feu]][[hak:PiГЎng-sut]][[ja:дёҷжҲҢ]][[ko:лі‘мҲ ]][[nds:FГјГјr-Hund]][[vi:BГӯnh TuбәҘt]][[za:Bingjswt]][[zh-min-nan:PГ©ng-sut]][[zh-yue:дёҷжҲҢ]][[zh:дёҷжҲҢ]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:BД«ng-sГЎeМӨk]][[de:Feuer-Hund]][[fr:Chien de feu]][[hak:PiГЎng-sut]][[ja:дёҷжҲҢ]][[ko:лі‘мҲ ]][[nds:FГјГјr-Hund]][[vi:BГӯnh TuбәҘt]][[za:Bingjswt]][[zh-min-nan:PГ©ng-sut]][[zh-yue:дёҷжҲҢ]][[zh:дёҷжҲҢ]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Dog|kanji=дёҷжҲҢ|romaji=hinoe inu|onyomi=heijutsu|p=bЗҗxЕ«|w=ping-hsГј|mi=pК°iЕӢВІВ№ Й•y|y=bing2 seot1|j=bing2 seot1|ci=pЙӘЕӢ sЕ“tМҡ|mc=pГҰЕӢ syt|oc-bs=praЕӢ ssu|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as дёҷжҲҢ''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|OtsuyЕҚ|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|д№ҷй…ү|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/OtsuyЕҚ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/OtsuyЕҚ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дёҒдәҘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢжҖқжғі|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йҷ°йҷҪдә”иЎҢ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}вҖҷ {{ill|Bing|ja|дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|lt=Hinoe (дёҷ)|2=ja|3=дёҷ|4=zh|5=дёҷ|1=Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дёҷ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зҒ«)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|2=uk|3=Р’РҫРіРҫРҪСҢ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hб»Ҹa (NgЕ© hГ nh)|10=ar|11=Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Шұ (ЩҲЩҲ ШҙЩҠЩҶШә)|lt=Fire (зҒ«)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}вҖҷ {{ill|Dog (zodiac)|en|Dog (zodiac)|WD=Q755126|lt=Dog (жҲҢ)|1=Dog (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (еңҹ)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (еңҹ)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (еңҹ)|2=ru|3=Р—РөРјР»СҸ (Сғ-СҒРёРҪ)|4=mn|5=РЁРҫСҖРҫРҫ (РјР°С…РұРҫРҙ)|6=uk|7=Р—РөРјР»СҸ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|8=als|9=Г„rde in dr chinesische FГјmf-ElemГӨnt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thб»• (NgЕ© hГ nh)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (еңҹ)|2=ru|3=Р—РөРјР»СҸ (Сғ-СҒРёРҪ)|4=mn|5=РЁРҫСҖРҫРҫ (РјР°С…РұРҫРҙ)|6=uk|7=Р—РөРјР»СҸ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|8=als|9=Г„rde in dr chinesische FГјmf-ElemГӨnt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thб»• (NgЕ© hГ nh)|lt=Earth (еңҹ)|lt=Earth (еңҹ)|2=ru|3=Р—РөРјР»СҸ (Сғ-СҒРёРҪ)|4=mn|5=РЁРҫСҖРҫРҫ (РјР°С…РұРҫРҙ)|6=uk|7=Р—РөРјР»СҸ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|8=als|9=Г„rde in dr chinesische FГјmf-ElemГӨnt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thб»• (NgЕ© hГ nh)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (еңҹ)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (еңҹ)|2=ru|3=Р—РөРјР»СҸ (Сғ-СҒРёРҪ)|4=mn|5=РЁРҫСҖРҫРҫ (РјР°С…РұРҫРҙ)|6=uk|7=Р—РөРјР»СҸ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|8=als|9=Г„rde in dr chinesische FГјmf-ElemГӨnt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thб»• (NgЕ© hГ nh)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (еңҹ)|2=ru|3=Р—РөРјР»СҸ (Сғ-СҒРёРҪ)|4=mn|5=РЁРҫСҖРҫРҫ (РјР°С…РұРҫРҙ)|6=uk|7=Р—РөРјР»СҸ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|8=als|9=Г„rde in dr chinesische FГјmf-ElemГӨnt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thб»• (NgЕ© hГ nh)|lt=Earth (еңҹ)|lt=Earth (еңҹ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (еңҹ)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (еңҹ)|2=ru|3=Р—РөРјР»СҸ (Сғ-СҒРёРҪ)|4=mn|5=РЁРҫСҖРҫРҫ (РјР°С…РұРҫРҙ)|6=uk|7=Р—РөРјР»СҸ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|8=als|9=Г„rde in dr chinesische FГјmf-ElemГӨnt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thб»• (NgЕ© hГ nh)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (еңҹ)|2=ru|3=Р—РөРјР»СҸ (Сғ-СҒРёРҪ)|4=mn|5=РЁРҫСҖРҫРҫ (РјР°С…РұРҫРҙ)|6=uk|7=Р—РөРјР»СҸ (РЈ-СҒС–РҪ)|8=als|9=Г„rde in dr chinesische FГјmf-ElemГӨnt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thб»• (NgЕ© hГ nh)|lt=Earth (еңҹ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and they interact by {{ill|Aioi|en|Aioi|WD=Q4697552|lt=Mutual Generation|1=Aioi}} (Fire produces Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Fire Dog (дёҷжҲҢ)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bЗҗngxЕ«
** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-inu
***Onyomi 1: heiju
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsul (лі‘мҲ )
** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): BГӯnh TuбәҘt

<!--
==
* Yang Fire Dog (дёҷжҲҢ) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bЗҗngxЕ«
** Cantonese (Jyutping): beng2 zeoi3
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: гҒІгҒ®гҒҲгҒ„гҒ¬ (hinoe-inu)
***Onyomi: гҒёгҒ„гҒӢгҒ®гҒ„гҒ¬ (heika-no-inu)
***Onyomi: гҒёгҒ„гҒҳгӮ…гҒӨ (heijutsu)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): byeongsuk
** Vietnamese (HГЎn-Viб»Үt): BГӯnh TuбәҘt

-->
==Years of Yang Fire Dog==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 26 when divided by 60 is a year of Bingu.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Bingu'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 26|en|AD 26|WD=Q23774|lt=26 AD|1=AD 26}}
* {{ill|AD 86|en|AD 86|WD=Q30477|lt=86 AD|1=AD 86}}
* {{ill|AD 146|en|AD 146|WD=Q31372|lt=146 AD|1=AD 146}}
* {{ill|206|en|206|WD=Q30819|lt=206 AD|1=206}}
* {{ill|266|en|266|WD=Q32109|lt=266 AD|1=266}}
* {{ill|326|en|326|WD=Q34056|lt=326 AD|1=326}}
* {{ill|386|en|386|WD=Q34118|lt=386 AD|1=386}}
* {{ill|446|en|446|WD=Q31076|lt=446 AD|1=446}}
* {{ill|506|en|506|WD=Q32909|lt=506 AD|1=506}}
* {{ill|566|en|566|WD=Q32609|lt=566 AD|1=566}}
* {{ill|626|en|626|WD=Q31052|lt=626 AD|1=626}}
* {{ill|686|en|686|WD=Q30619|lt=686 AD|1=686}}
* {{ill|746|en|746|WD=Q23616|lt=746 AD|1=746}}
* {{ill|806|en|806|WD=Q30021|lt=806 AD|1=806}}
* {{ill|866|en|866|WD=Q23872|lt=866 AD|1=866}}
* {{ill|926|en|926|WD=Q24369|lt=926 AD|1=926}}
* {{ill|986|en|986|WD=Q23785|lt=986 AD|1=986}}
|
* {{ill|1046|en|1046|WD=Q19354|lt=1046 AD|1=1046}}
* {{ill|1106|en|1106|WD=Q19508|lt=1106 AD|1=1106}}
* {{ill|1166|en|1166|WD=Q19677|lt=1166 AD|1=1166}}
* {{ill|1226|en|1226|WD=Q5405|lt=1226 AD|1=1226}}
* {{ill|1286|en|1286|WD=Q5548|lt=1286 AD|1=1286}}
* {{ill|1346|en|1346|WD=Q6080|lt=1346 AD|1=1346}}
* {{ill|1406|en|1406|WD=Q6129|lt=1406 AD|1=1406}}
* {{ill|1466|en|1466|WD=Q6559|lt=1466 AD|1=1466}}
* {{ill|1526|en|1526|WD=Q6325|lt=1526 AD|1=1526}}
* {{ill|1586|en|1586|WD=Q6739|lt=1586 AD|1=1586}}
* {{ill|1646|en|1646|WD=Q6930|lt=1646 AD|1=1646}}
* {{ill|1706|en|1706|WD=Q6835|lt=1706 AD|1=1706}}
* {{ill|1766|en|1766|WD=Q7669|lt=1766 AD|1=1766}}
* {{ill|1826|en|1826|WD=Q7004|lt=1826 AD|1=1826}}
* {{ill|1886|en|1886|WD=Q7822|lt=1886 AD|1=1886}}
* {{ill|1946|en|1946|WD=Q18610|lt=1946 AD|1=1946}}
|
* {{ill|2006|en|2006|WD=Q2021|lt=2006 AD|1=2006}}
* {{ill|2066 AD|ja|2066е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2066|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2066 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2060е№ҙд»Ј|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2126 AD|ja|2126е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2126|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2126 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22дё–зҙҖ|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2186 AD|ja|2186е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2186|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2186 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22дё–зҙҖ|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2246 AD|ja|2246е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2246|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2246 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23дё–зҙҖ|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2306 AD|ja|2306е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2306|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2306 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24дё–зҙҖ|1=24th century|WD=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2366 AD|ja|2366е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2366|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2366 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2426 AD|ja|2426е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2426|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2426 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2486 AD|ja|2486е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2486|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2486 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2546 AD|ja|2546е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2546|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2546 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2606 AD|ja|2606е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2606|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2606 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2666 AD|ja|2666е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2666|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2666 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2726 AD|ja|2726е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2726|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2726 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2786 AD|ja|2786е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2786|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2786 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2846 AD|ja|2846е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2846|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2846 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2906 AD|ja|2906е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2906|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2906 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2966 AD|ja|2966е№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2966|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2966 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yang Fire Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are either {{ill|Geng|ja|еәҡ|1=Kanoe (еәҡ)|lt=Kanoe (еәҡ)|2=ja|3=еәҡ|4=zh|5=еәҡ|1=Kanoe (еәҡ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еәҡ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еәҡ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|д№ҷ|1=Kinoto (д№ҷ)|lt=Kinoto (д№ҷ)|2=ja|3=д№ҷ|4=zh|5=д№ҷ|1=Kinoto (д№ҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (д№ҷ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (д№ҷ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term вҖңmonthвҖқ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Dog==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|TenpЕҚkure|ja|еҚҒж–№жҡ®|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenpЕҚkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenpЕҚkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:PГӘng-chГәn]]
[[zh-yue:дёҷжҲҢ]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Fire Dog|qq=ja|дёҷжҲҢ|version=98658021|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:BГ®ng-cб№іМ„de]]
[[nds:Holt-Hundvi]]
[[de:Yang Fire Dog]]
[[ja:дёҷжҲҢ]]

[[zh:дёҷжҲҢ]]
[[ko:лі‘мҲ ]]
[[fr:Chien de feu]]
[[de:Feuer-Hund]]

[[af:Vuurchond (astrologie)]]
[[de:Feuer-Hundeen]]
[[en:Fire Dog]]
[[fr:Chien de feushak]]
[[it:Bing-chб№іМҒid]]

[[vi:BГӯnh TuбәҘt]]
[[za:Bingceij]]
[[ar:Yang Fire Dog]]

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuurhond (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:BД«ng-sГЎeМӨk]]
[[hak:PiГЎng-sut]]
[[nds:FГјГјr-Hund]]
[[za:Bingjswt]]
[[zh-min-nan:PГ©ng-sut]]
[[zh-yue:дёҷжҲҢ]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuurhond (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:BД«ng-sГЎeМӨk]]
[[hak:PiГЎng-sut]]
[[nds:FГјГјr-Hund]]
[[za:Bingjswt]]
[[zh-min-nan:PГ©ng-sut]]
[[zh-yue:дёҷжҲҢ]]
{{wikidata link|Q1062512}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
